initial_candidates.sql:
WITH double_bond_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        molecule_id, 
        COUNT(*) AS double_bond_count
    FROM bond
    WHERE bond_type = 'double'
    GROUP BY molecule_id
),
max_double_bond_molecule AS (
    SELECT molecule_id
    FROM double_bond_counts
    ORDER BY double_bond_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 
            FROM max_double_bond_molecule m
            JOIN molecule mol ON m.molecule_id = mol.molecule_id
            WHERE mol.label LIKE '%carcinogen%' OR mol.label LIKE '%Carcinogen%'
        ) THEN 'yes'
        ELSE 'no'
    END AS is_carcinogenic;

WITH double_bonds AS (
  SELECT molecule_id, COUNT(*) AS double_bond_count
  FROM bond
  WHERE bond_type = 'double'
  GROUP BY molecule_id
),
max_double_bonds AS (
  SELECT molecule_id
  FROM double_bonds
  WHERE double_bond_count = (SELECT MAX(double_bond_count) FROM double_bonds)
)
SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM molecule WHERE molecule_id IN (SELECT molecule_id FROM max_double_bonds)
) THEN 'yes' ELSE 'no' END AS is_carcinogenic;

SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
    WHERE b.bond_type = 'double'
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) = (
        SELECT MAX(double_count)
        FROM (
            SELECT COUNT(*) AS double_count
            FROM bond
            WHERE bond_type = 'double'
            GROUP BY molecule_id
        )
    )
    AND m.molecule_id IN (
        SELECT molecule_id
        FROM molecule
        WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' OR label LIKE '%Carcinogenic%'
    )
) THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS is_most_double_bonds_carcinogenic;

SELECT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double'
GROUP BY m.molecule_id
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT m.molecule_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double'
GROUP BY m.molecule_id
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
    WHERE b.bond_type = 'double'
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) = (
        SELECT MAX(double_count)
        FROM (
            SELECT COUNT(*) AS double_count
            FROM bond
            WHERE bond_type = 'double'
            GROUP BY molecule_id
        )
    )
    AND m.molecule_id IN (
        SELECT molecule_id
        FROM molecule
        WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' OR label LIKE '%Carcinogenic%'
    )
) THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS is_most_double_bonds_carcinogenic;

candidates.sql:
SELECT CASE 
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM (
            SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(*) AS double_bond_count
            FROM molecule m
            JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
            WHERE b.bond_type = 'double'
            GROUP BY m.molecule_id
        ) t1
        JOIN (
            SELECT molecule_id
            FROM molecule
            WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' OR label LIKE '%Carcinogenic%'
        ) t2 ON t1.molecule_id = t2.molecule_id
        WHERE t1.double_bond_count = (
            SELECT MAX(double_bond_count)
            FROM (
                SELECT COUNT(*) AS double_bond_count
                FROM bond
                WHERE bond_type = 'double'
                GROUP BY molecule_id
            )
        )
    ) THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' 
END AS is_most_double_bonds_carcinogenic;

SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM (
        SELECT m.molecule_id
        FROM molecule m
        JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
        WHERE b.bond_type = 'double'
        GROUP BY m.molecule_id
        ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
        LIMIT 1
    ) top_mol
    WHERE top_mol.molecule_id IN (
        SELECT molecule_id
        FROM molecule
        WHERE label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' OR label LIKE '%Carcinogenic%'
    )
) THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS is_most_double_bonds_carcinogenic;
